rationale.R1.2: Reordering the four paragraphs (setup → prior work → results → contribution, currently inverted from standard IMRaD logic) requires verifying that cross-paragraph premises still flow into conclusions after relocation; coherence breaks if, e.g., the results paragraph is moved before the method it references is introduced.

The artifact presents contribution/method after results, which is the primary disorder to correct. This is the load-bearing dimension: a structurally unchanged output fully invalidates the delegation.
